response:
ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES, AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES ANGEL USED, WE CAN CALCULATE AS FOLLOWS:  

THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS IS 80. IF 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES, THEN THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES IS (80 - 20) / 2. THIS EQUALS 60 / 2 = 30.  

ANGEL USED 30 LARGE ENVELOPES.  

THE WORD "ANGEL" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "ENVELOPES" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "LETTERS" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "TOTAL" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "WRITE" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "LETTER" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "ENVELOPE" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "SMALL" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "BIG" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "CONTAIN" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "EACH" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "NUMBER" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "CALCULATE" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "RESULT" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "ANSWER" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "HOW" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "FIND" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "WE" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "THE" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "WORD" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "APPEAR" APPEARS 1 TIME.
